description_long: This is a modern, tactical shotgun with a compact, robust design, featuring a matte dark gray and black color scheme. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The shotgun has a prominent full stock with angular lines and a thick, ergonomic pistol grip for enhanced handling. The top of the receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is relatively short, suggesting suitability for close-quarters urban environments. The magazine appears to be detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte gray and black finish, featuring a full stock, ergonomic pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the full stock, pistol grip, Picatinny rail, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the grip and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, grip, and magazine, with clear visibility of the receiver and rail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the grip and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
